required: exact local job record remains bound to the approved input hash
Gaussian process is no longer alive after a stable terminal observation
complete log is fetched after terminal process evidence
scheduler state is terminal, self-purged, or separately classified as a repeatedly proven terminal zombie
terminal_evidence_gate.precedence_rule: A live PBS session process outranks an intermediate Normal termination marker; never parse a partial Opt/Freq log as final.

mode_review_gate.expected_displacement: The sole imaginary mode must project onto C13-C21 bond formation in both plus and minus displacement structures.

outcome_matrix.conditions: All terminal and TS gates pass and the separately confirmed C13-C21 mode decision is accepted.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Record sanitized B2 evidence; any B1/B2 topology comparison or IRC requires a separate scientific review.

outcome_matrix.conditions: The final stationary point has no raw imaginary frequency.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Classify as the wrong stationary-point type and stop for diagnosis.

outcome_matrix.conditions: The final frequency calculation has more than one raw imaginary frequency.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Classify as a higher-order saddle candidate and stop for diagnosis.

outcome_matrix.conditions: Exactly one imaginary frequency exists but its reviewed displacement does not clearly follow C13-C21 bond formation.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Reject mode consistency and stop for a new three-tier retry proposal.

outcome_matrix.conditions: Optimization, stationary-point, terminal, or complete-frequency evidence is absent.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Preserve artifacts, report incomplete evidence, and do not infer a TS.

outcome_matrix.conditions: Gaussian reports an error termination or the terminal process evidence is interrupted.
outcome_matrix.next_action: Preserve and diagnose the exact failed run without changing chemistry or resubmitting.

path_claim.claim_limit: An accepted mode establishes only a mode-consistent first-order saddle candidate; bidirectional IRC remains separately gated.

forbidden_automatic_actions: change method, basis, solvent, route, structure, charge, multiplicity, memory, or cores
